summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest API tests pass (CRUD, validation, photo upload/serve, relationship mirroring, reference cleanup on delete). Frontend: full e2e flows pass — empty state → add first member → 3D node renders → details panel → edit name persists → add parent/partner/child via chips with correct relations (parent_ids set, partner mirrored) → delete removes node + cleans up references. Visible parent-child connection line confirmed. Only minor a11y warnings, no functional bugs.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button can be below viewport on smaller screens; requires panel scroll to reach. Not blocking (panel is scrollable), but a sticky footer with delete would improve UX.

issues: Radix Dialog/Sheet a11y warnings logged in console: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby'. SheetTitle/SheetDescription are imported in DetailsPanel.jsx but never rendered. Add a visually-hidden SheetTitle/SheetDescription (e.g., the member name) inside SheetContent to silence warnings and improve screen-reader support.

action_items: Optional: Render <SheetTitle> (e.g. member name, possibly inside VisuallyHidden) and <SheetDescription> inside DetailsPanel's SheetContent to fix Radix a11y warnings.
Optional: Make delete button sticky or auto-scroll into view when expanded in DetailsPanel.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_member: validation runs against the requested values, but partner mirror logic and update_one happen even if validation passes silently for empty diffs — OK in practice. parent_ids self-reference check exists in PATCH but not in POST /members (a member could be created with parent_ids containing its own future id only if client provides id — currently id is server-generated so it's safe, but adding the same check in create_member would be defensive).

server.py create_member: when partner_ids is provided at create time, the mirror is added but the reverse-side existence has already been validated. Good. However, if the same partner appears in partner_ids twice, $addToSet dedupes — fine.

AddMemberDialog.jsx: dynamic `await import('../lib/api')` inside submit() to call updateMember is unnecessary since updateMember is already exported from api.js and can be imported statically at the top.
DetailsPanel.jsx imports SheetTitle / SheetDescription but never renders them — root cause of the Radix a11y warnings.
Frontend Scene3D loads with a global WebGL context; if R3F throws (e.g. unsupported GPU) there is no fallback — consider a simple error boundary around <Canvas> for resilience.
FamilyTreeApp.jsx: error toasts swallow underlying error.response.data.detail except in AddMemberDialog — consider surfacing backend detail on delete/update failures too.
seed_data_creation: Deleted pre-existing 'Alice' record. Created/cleaned-up Eleanor, Arthur, George during frontend testing; remaining members were deleted at end of run. DB should be empty now.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_members_api.py self-cleans TEST_ prefixed data. Frontend e2e flows verified: empty state, add (first/child/partner/parent presets), 3D node render with data-testid='member-node-{id}', details panel edit/delete, connection lines visible (parent-child solid, partner dashed). data-testid kebab-case naming is consistent across components.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only one Radix a11y console warning (DetailsPanel SheetTitle/SheetDescription not rendered though imported). RCA: shadcn Sheet wraps Radix Dialog which requires accessible name/desc; the component imports them at line 3 of DetailsPanel.jsx but the JSX body never includes <SheetTitle>/<SheetDescription>. Mitigation: render <SheetTitle>{member.name}</SheetTitle> (optionally wrapped in VisuallyHidden) and an optional <SheetDescription> inside SheetContent.
